_comment: Species: Spirit Eagle (灵鹰) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Spirit Eagle

canonical.appearance: Majestic eagle 2 m wingspan, feathers spirit-gold, eyes pierce illusions
canonical.size: 2 m wingspan adult, 40 jin; ancient 5 m, 800 jin
canonical.behavior: Aerial predator; cultivates by absorbing wind-essence; hunts from great heights
canonical.habitat: Mountain peaks, sky-aspected zones, high cliffs
canonical.diet: spirit rabbits, spirit foxes, smaller birds
canonical.relationships: Rival of spirit cranes; preyed upon by thunder birds
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: spirit_eagle — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
